transcription.text: Fiat presents Strada, front-wheel drive, Italian flair. Strada, with a remarkable new engine that delivers better mileage, better than the gas engine Rabbit, plus a gas-saving, engine-saving fifth-gear standard. It's a car with style and class and no expensive habits, beginning with the price. Strada, another Italian work.
